ddls:
CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "background" TEXT /* Background information of the donor (e.g., occupation, company) */,
  "net_worth" TEXT /* Net worth of the donor */,
  "estimated_lifetime_giving" TEXT /* Estimated lifetime giving of the donor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the donor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the donor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the donor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the donor */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the donor */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Number of family members */,
  "annual_income" TEXT /* Annual income of the donor */,
  "wealth_source" TEXT /* Source of wealth (e.g., business, inheritance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the donor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the donor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cause (e.g., healthcare, education) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact the cause aims to achieve */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cause record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cause record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor who made the donation */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause supported by the donation */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the donation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the donation was made */,
  "method_of_donation" TEXT /* Method used for the donation (e.g., check, online transfer) */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., one-time, recurring) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the donation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the donation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the donation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "giving_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each giving goal */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor who set the goal */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause related to the goal */,
  "target_amount" TEXT /* Target amount for the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_giving_goals_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_giving_goals_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wealth_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wealth manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the wealth manager */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Name of the wealth management firm */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the wealth manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the wealth manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wealth manager record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wealth manager record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "philanthropic_experts" (
  "expert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each philanthropic expert */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the philanthropic expert */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization they represent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the philanthropic expert */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the philanthropic expert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expert record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expert record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donor_advisor_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor (wealth manager or philanthropic expert) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the advisor (e.g., wealth manager, philanthropic advisor) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship ended (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_advisor_relationships_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES philanthropic_experts ("expert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_advisor_relationships_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_advisor_relationships_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES wealth_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donor_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "donor_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first donor */,
  "donor_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second donor */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause supported by the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborative project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration ended (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_collaborations_donor_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id1") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_collaborations_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_collaborations_donor_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id2") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_receipts" (
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receipt */,
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the receipt was issued */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount acknowledged in the receipt */,
  "method_of_receipt" TEXT /* Method of issuing the receipt (e.g., email, mail) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the receipt (e.g., issued, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the receipt was issued */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the receipt was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_receipts_donation_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_id") REFERENCES donations ("donation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_benefits" (
  "tax_benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax benefit */,
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Tax year the donation was made */,
  "tax_credit" TEXT /* Tax credit received for the donation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tax benefit (e.g., claimed, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax benefit was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax benefit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_benefits_donation_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_id") REFERENCES donations ("donation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donor_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "background_info" TEXT /* Background information of the donor */,
  "philanthropic_interests" TEXT /* Philanthropic interests of the donor */,
  "philanthropic_history" TEXT /* History of the donor's philanthropic activities */,
  "impact_story" TEXT /* A story or summary of the impact of the donor's contributions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_profiles_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donor_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause recommended */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Recommended donation amount */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_recommendations_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_recommendations_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)
